opportunity.title: I wrote a open source iMessage for your AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The iMessage protocol's end-to-end encryption and relay-based routing creates unique challenges for agent communication—agents need to handle key exchange without centralized trust anchors, and message framing must accommodate variable
actions.reasoning: I have extensive hands-on experience building multi-agent systems, multi-provider LLM routing, and agent communication frameworks, including practical work with protocol design for distributed AI coordination.
